# StackD — Project Structure

## Overview
StackD is a single-page marketing site built with Astro, presenting webs, automations, and software services for SMEs.

## Sections

- **Inicio** (/) — Hero, services overview, projects, team, FAQ, and contact CTA
- **#proyectos** — Project showcase: SMASH, NOOK, Volea.io, Getflow
- **#contacto** — Contact CTA (mailto:info@louvrlabs.com)

## Tech Stack
- Astro 5 (latest stable)
- TypeScript strict mode
- Vanilla IntersectionObserver animations
- @astrojs/sitemap

## Contact
- Email: info@louvrlabs.com
- Website: https://TODO.example

## Team
- Arnau — Diseño y desarrollo
- Ezequiel — Desarrollo y relación con clientes
